title: Why “notts county vs nottm forest” is trending in GB: 2,000+ searches, the facts (July 18, 2026)
description: “notts county vs nottm forest” is trending in GB with 2,000+ searches reported by Google. The verified coverage behind the spike, from Nottingham Forest FC and 2 more.

sources.title: Watch Forest's visit to Notts County for £1.99
Oliver Glasner sets his stall out with Nottingham Forest XI to face Notts County

sections.heading: What is trending: “notts county vs nottm forest”
paragraphs: “notts county vs nottm forest” appeared on Google Trends' Trending Now list for GB (snapshot taken 2026-07-18T13:51:46+00:00 UTC). Google reports at least 2,000 searches for this term — that figure is a lower bound published in the official Trends feed, not an exact count.

sections.heading: What's behind the spike — the coverage
paragraphs: The Trends feed associates this search spike with 3 news stories from Nottingham Forest FC, Nottingham Post, Notts County FC. The headlines, exactly as published:
list: “Watch Forest's visit to Notts County for £1.99” — Nottingham Forest FC
“Oliver Glasner sets his stall out with Nottingham Forest XI to face Notts County” — Nottingham Post

sections.heading: Timeline
paragraphs: The trend entry was published to the Google Trends feed at Sat, 18 Jul 2026 06:10:00 -0700. Our snapshot was taken at 2026-07-18T13:51:46+00:00 UTC and this briefing was assembled at 2026-07-18T13:51:58+00:00 UTC.

sections.heading: How to read these numbers
paragraphs: Google Trends reports approximate search volume as a lower bound (for example “20K+”). Actual volume can be significantly higher. Trending status reflects acceleration in searches, not the absolute size of a topic. For the full story behind the spike, read the cited coverage below — this briefing intentionally adds no speculation beyond the sourced facts.

faq.q: Why is “notts county vs nottm forest” trending?
faq.a: Google's Trending Now feed links the spike to coverage from Nottingham Forest FC, Nottingham Post, Notts County FC. The associated headlines are: “Watch Forest's visit to Notts County for £1.99” (Nottingham Forest FC); “STREAM: FOREST (H)” (Notts County FC); “Oliver Glasner sets his stall out with Nottingham Forest XI to face Notts County” (Nottingham Post).

faq.q: How many people searched for “notts county vs nottm forest”?
faq.a: Google reports at least 2,000 searches in GB as of the feed snapshot. This is a published lower bound, not an exact count.

faq.q: Where is “notts county vs nottm forest” trending?
faq.a: This snapshot covers GB. The same term may trend differently in other regions.
